Operation 'subscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description 'Trigger subscribe enrollment endpoint' is vague and doesn't explain what subscribing actually does or what the user should expect. Added clarity about webhook purpose, what events trigger notifications, authentication requirement, and return value for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Enrolls the authenticated user in webhook notifications for burp events. Registers the webhook endpoint to receive real-time updates when burps are created, updated, or completed. Returns subscription confirmation with webhook ID and status.
data.reasoning: Current description 'Trigger subscribe enrollment endpoint' is vague and doesn't explain what subscribing actually does or what the user should expect. Added clarity about webhook purpose, what events trigger notifications, authentication requirement, and return value for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'unsubscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description 'Trigger unsubscribe endpoint' lacks specificity about what unsubscribing accomplishes and what the response contains. Added context about deactivation, cessation of notifications, and return confirmation for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Removes the authenticated user from webhook notifications and deactivates the registered webhook endpoint. Stops all real-time burp event notifications. Returns confirmation of successful unsubscription.
data.reasoning: Current description 'Trigger unsubscribe endpoint' lacks specificity about what unsubscribing accomplishes and what the response contains. Added context about deactivation, cessation of notifications, and return confirmation for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'getPerformList' has semantic quality issues: unclear_purpose, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'Get Perform List' is misleading - it doesn't retrieve a list but a single burp. Description is unclear about purpose and use case. Improved summary to reflect actual behavior, added context about authentication, use case (testing), and clarified that it returns a single burp object rather than a list.

data.current_description: Gets last created connected burp if found, else returns a sample burp.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve latest burp or sample burp
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the most recently created burp connected to the authenticated user's Zapier integration. If no burps exist, returns a sample burp for reference. Useful for testing and verifying burp structure. Returns a single burp object.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get Perform List' is misleading - it doesn't retrieve a list but a single burp. Description is unclear about purpose and use case. Improved summary to reflect actual behavior, added context about authentication, use case (testing), and clarified that it returns a single burp object rather than a list.

message: Operation 'performAction' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary 'Perform Action' is too generic and doesn't indicate what actions are possible. Description lists operations but lacks detail about inputs, outputs, and side effects. Improved summary to be more specific about burp operations, expanded description to explain ActionRequest requirement, return values, and authentication, enabling AI agents to understand when and how to use this multi-purpose endpoint.

data.current_description: Create, find, or update burp records.
data.summary_suggestion: Create, find, or update burp records
data.description_suggestion: Performs CRUD operations on burp records. Supports creating new burps, finding existing burps by criteria, or updating burp properties. Requires ActionRequest object specifying the action type and relevant burp data. Returns the created, found, or updated burp object with all current properties. Authentication required.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Perform Action' is too generic and doesn't indicate what actions are possible. Description lists operations but lacks detail about inputs, outputs, and side effects. Improved summary to be more specific about burp operations, expanded description to explain ActionRequest requirement, return values, and authentication, enabling AI agents to understand when and how to use this multi-purpose endpoint.
